name: AgentOps
description: Observability platform purpose-built for AI agents. Track agent sessions, LLM calls, tool use, and costs. Integrates with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, and OpenAI.

skills.name: Record full agent sessions including every LLM call, tool use, and state transition
skills.description: Record full agent sessions including every LLM call, tool use, and state transition

skills.name: Track token usage and costs per agent run across all major LLM providers
skills.description: Track token usage and costs per agent run across all major LLM providers

skills.name: Monitor tool execution timing and failures to diagnose agent bottlenecks
skills.description: Monitor tool execution timing and failures to diagnose agent bottlenecks

skills.name: Replay any agent session step-by-step for debugging and root cause analysis
skills.description: Replay any agent session step-by-step for debugging and root cause analysis

skills.name: Integrate with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, and OpenAI SDK in two lines of code
skills.description: Integrate with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, and OpenAI SDK in two lines of code
